description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this shoe makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag and a plastic shoe horn Upper Full grain leather upper with supple leather inner lining for comfort Stitched detailing and synthetic overlays for enhanced shoe structure Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with TPU on the forefoot Wave-styled grooved for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
